## SK Hynix CEO extends memory shortage warning: scarcity set to outlast the decade

If the supply shortage is structural through the decade, memory producers gain sustained pricing power and capital-returns visibility well beyond the current cycle — a potential re-rating catalyst for MU and SK Hynix, and a persistent cost headwind for HBM-dependent AI system builders.

- Near-duplicate of the 671b warning but adds an explicitly multi-year horizon — shortages described as persisting beyond 2027 through the end of the decade.
- The 'outlast the decade' framing is structurally more severe than the single-year read in 671b.
- Same tickers implicated: SK Hynix (000660.KS), MU, Samsung (005930.KS).
- Two separate outlets now corroborating the same executive message increases signal reliability.
